title: Speaker mod (Pre-alpha)
description: Cool speaker block that adds some sounds (2 sounds so far I will expand though!) new uptd just dropped btw
body:
Awesome speaker (first mod)

please note this is my first mod and this is Pre-pre-pre-pre-pre-pre-Alpha so dont be disapointed when there's only...

two sounds!

sounds so far:

Speaker:

- "Warning Unothorised biological Lifeform detected in sector C" Black mesa announcment.             
- Bonk SFX

Proximity speaker:

BROKEN (do not step on it unless you want to be deaf)

Note: NEW UPDT! NEW BONK SFX!!!
